content: Official GitHub and local git verification pin xai-org/grok-build at public commit 3af4d5d39897855bdcc74f23e690024a5dc05573 (version 0.2.109), whose SOURCE_REV is 0f4d7c91b8b2b408333f6de1e8a76cb8eaa71899. Six post-publish sync commits contain 168 explicit change-summary bullets; the cumulative initial-public-to-tip delta changes 872 paths. The in-tree changelog covers releases 0.2.101–0.2.109 and is the primary user-facing inventory, while commit bodies expose operational/security details absent from release notes.
